name: OIDC RBAC
description: Advanced OIDC authentication with role-based library access control
overview: OpenID Connect SSO with role-to-library mapping, multi-provider support, and admin UI.

versions.changelog: Fix OidcAuthProvider not registered with Jellyfin DI; fix new user creation crashing on ChangePassword; fix MaxParentalRating defaulting to 0; fix credential storage missing ServerId
